title: Web UI Demo-Readiness: Dashboard Overhaul + Detail Page Enhancements
summary: Design for dashboard tabs, detail-page metadata/findings, and proto/backend changes to close web UI data gaps before demos.
notes: Filed under docs/superpowers/specs/ with 'design' in filename and Status: Approved (ADR-like), but content is implementation contract (proto fields, file changes, component tables) rather than a single architectural decision or user-facing requirements list; classified SPEC over ADR/PRD due to concrete technical contract signals dominating.
